data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Data is encrypted both at rest and in transit to protect against unauthorized access.

data.title: Identity Management
data.description: Robust identity management to ensure secure access to resources.
data.technical_spec: Single Sign-On and Multi-Factor Authentication are implemented.

data.title: Threat Detection
data.description: Advanced systems for detecting and responding to potential threats.
data.technical_spec: Integration with SIEM platforms for real-time threat analysis.

data.title: Incident Response
data.description: Comprehensive incident response plan to address security breaches quickly.
data.technical_spec: Dedicated SOC with incident response tools.

data.title: Network Security
data.description: Multiple layers of security to protect against network intrusions.
data.technical_spec: Firewalls, Intrusion Detection and Prevention Systems.
